### `r ad$label`

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "scores")
if (is_html) {
  msens::plot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    interactive  = TRUE,
    title        = ad$label)
} else {
  msens::ggplot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    title        = ad$label)
}
```

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "species")
msens::tbl_species(ad$spp, interactive = is_html)
```
